items.title: SEC Announces New Members of Small Business Capital Formation Advisory Committee
items.raw_excerpt: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced five new members of the Small Business Capital Formation Advisory Committee. The new members were appointed to four-year terms and will join the 15 current …
